strengths: Completed all required phases including needle passes and extracorporeal knot tying
Maintained good timing at 180 seconds, well within intermediate benchmarks
Successfully performed the suture introduction and target passes
weaknesses: Failed to achieve complete slit closure, leaving a visible gap in the Penrose drain
Insufficient knot tightening or positioning to fully approximate the slit edges
May have rushed the final closure assessment phase

drills.name: Slit-closure check drill
drills.description: Tighten just enough to close the slit without avulsion, then visually inspect for complete edge approximation before cutting
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to achieve complete slit closure

drills.name: Knot-pusher sequencing drill
drills.description: Practice 10 three-throw extracorporeal sequences with deliberate pusher advancement and controlled tightening

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your consistent timing into precise closure technique. Complete slit approximation is essential before advancing to speed optimization.
